info.title: Open Jarvis API
info.description:
REST + AG-UI HTTP contract for Open Jarvis (Hermes UI).

**Auth:** Prefer the better-auth session cookie, or `Authorization: Bearer hrm_*` API tokens.
When `HOST=127.0.0.1` and `ALLOW_SIGNUP=false`, localhost requests bypass auth (dev-only).

**Database:** Resource schemas include `x-db-table` pointing at Drizzle tables in `server/src/db/schema.ts`.
See `docs/DATABASE-DESIGN.md` for the ERD/narrative companion.

**System maintenance cron:** On boot the scheduler seeds **DB Consistency**, **Bug Bounty**, and **Status Auto-Approve** every 2 minutes. They check then auto-fix / auto-approve pending issues; results land in `cron_runs.detail.maintenance`. See `GET /api/cron/system`.

Interactive docs: `/api/docs` · Machine-readable: `/api/openapi.json`.

servers.description: Same origin as the API server

tags.name: Cron
tags.description: Scheduled tasks. Built-in **DB Consistency**, **Bug Bounty**, and **Status Auto-Approve** jobs seed on boot at `*/2 * * * *` (check → auto-fix / auto-approve) (`GET /api/cron/system`).

post.description: Streams `text/event-stream` AG-UI events. Custom Hermes events include hermes.context, hermes.title, hermes.approval.required, a2ui.message, etc. (see HermesCustomEvent schema).

schema.description: SSE frames; data payloads are AG-UI / HermesCustomEvent JSON

post.summary: Sync skills from disk / git sources

get.description: Includes user jobs and built-in system maintenance jobs (DB Consistency, Bug Bounty, Status Auto-Approve) when seeded.

schedule.description: Cron expression. System maintenance jobs use `*/2 * * * *` (every 2 minutes).

workflow.description: Enterprise workflow config. When `systemKind` is set, the scheduler runs a deterministic maintenance handler (check + auto-fix) instead of an LLM turn.

systemKind.description: Built-in maintenance runner. `db-consistency` repairs orphans/stale bindings/stuck runs and prunes old events. `bug-bounty` runs security hygiene and auto-fixes safe issues. `status-auto-approve` ensures autoApproveAll is on and auto-approves any pending HITL approvals.

get.description: Returns the catalog and live rows for **DB Consistency**, **Bug Bounty**, and **Status Auto-Approve**. All are seeded on server boot at `*/2 * * * *` (check → auto-fix / auto-approve). Use `POST /api/cron/{id}/run` to trigger immediately.

workflow.description: Enterprise workflow config. When `systemKind` is set, the scheduler runs a deterministic maintenance handler (check + auto-fix) instead of an LLM turn.

systemKind.description: Built-in maintenance runner. `db-consistency` repairs orphans/stale bindings/stuck runs and prunes old events. `bug-bounty` runs security hygiene and auto-fixes safe issues. `status-auto-approve` ensures autoApproveAll is on and auto-approves any pending HITL approvals.

delete.description: Deleting built-in system jobs is allowed; they are re-seeded on next server boot.

get.description: For system jobs, `detail.maintenance` includes check/fix findings.

post.description: Forces an immediate run. System maintenance jobs (`systemKind`) execute check-and-fix handlers instead of an LLM turn.

post.summary: Register the Jarvis MCP bridge in Open Cowork mcp-config.json

302.description: Redirect back to UI with office result

get.summary: Today live calendar briefing from Graph

get.description: Auto-approve is locked ON (never off). Status Auto-Approve cron re-asserts every 2 minutes.
In-memory approvals waiting for resolve. The Status Auto-Approve cron (`*/2 * * * *`) auto-approves these.

post.summary: Enable autoApproveAll and approve all pending now
post.description: Same action the Status Auto-Approve system cron performs every 2 minutes.

SessionCookie.name: better-auth.session_token
SessionCookie.description: better-auth session cookie (name may vary by config).

CronWorkflow.description: Enterprise workflow config persisted in `cron_jobs.workflow`. `systemKind` selects a deterministic maintenance runner.

systemKind.description: When set, cron fires a check-and-fix / status auto-approve maintenance handler instead of an LLM agent turn.

schedule.description: Cron expression. Built-in system jobs use `*/2 * * * *`.

detail.description: Per-run snapshot. System jobs include `detail.maintenance` with `{ kind, ok, checked, fixed, findings }`.

schedule.description: Default schedule for built-in maintenance jobs

SettingsMap.description: Key/value settings; sensitive values are masked on read.

autoApproveAll.description: Ignored when false — auto-approve is locked on and cannot be disabled.

AguiRunInput.description: AG-UI agent run request (threadId / messages / tools).

HermesCustomEvent.description: Custom AG-UI SSE event envelope (see packages/shared/src/agui-events.ts).

AuthSessionResponse.description: better-auth session payload (shape varies by plugin).
